| [`civil-structural-engineer`](civil-structural-engineer.md) | Performs structural analysis and code-compliant design of buildings and structures — load paths, member sizing, and connections under recognized codes (Eurocode, ACI, AISC, ASCE 7). | 🔴 opus | structural-engineering, civil, eurocode, aisc |
| [`developer-advocate`](developer-advocate.md) | Builds and nurtures developer communities through technical content, sample apps, talks, and two-way feedback (DevRel). | 🟡 sonnet | devrel, developer-relations, community, technical-content |

| [`narratologist`](narratologist.md) | Applies narrative theory to story structure, plot, and character arcs — pacing, causality, point of view, and the architecture beneath a story. | 🟡 sonnet | narrative-theory, story-structure, plot, character-arc |
| [`psychologist`](psychologist.md) | Builds psychologically credible characters and behavior models for fiction and research — motivation, trauma, defense mechanisms, and consistent inner life grounded in real psychology. | 🟡 sonnet | psychology, character-development, motivation, behavior |

| [`technical-writer`](technical-writer.md) | Writes developer-facing documentation — API references, guides, tutorials, and READMEs — that engineers can actually follow. | 🟡 sonnet | documentation, technical-writing, api-docs, tutorials |

| [`web3-architect`](web3-architect.md) | Designs decentralized system architecture: protocol structure, token and incentive design, governance, and cross-chain topology — before any contract is written. | 🔴 opus | web3, tokenomics, defi, governance |
